`source_coverage_manifest_provenance.stabilized_by` mirrors upstream coverage history from riido-contracts: `teamswyg/riido-contracts#38`, `teamswyg/riido-contracts#39`, `teamswyg/riido-contracts#45`, `teamswyg/riido-contracts#46`, `teamswyg/riido-contracts#51`, `teamswyg/riido-contracts#52`, `teamswyg/riido-contracts#54`.

`teamswyg/riido-contracts#53` made `stabilized_by` a source field. Daemon records `mirrors_source_field = "stabilized_by"` and `source_field_introduced_by = "teamswyg/riido-contracts#53"` so local projection does not redefine upstream history.

The `figma-metadata-page-list-underreports-pages.v1` limitation is local mirror evidence for RIID-4843. It comes from riido-contracts stabilized by `teamswyg/riido-contracts#52`.

Required authoritative pages: `129:5215`, `42:3014`, `0:1`.
